security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Squeeze your video library and reclaim disk space, safely.
bundle.longDescription: sqz bulk re-encodes videos to efficient codecs (AV1/HEVC/H.264) and replaces the originals only after verifying the new file is playable, complete, and smaller. FFmpeg is bundled; works on any GPU or CPU.
